description_long: This is a single slice of chocolate cake with two visible layers of light pink filling, presented on a round, light gray plate. The cake is coated in a glossy, dark chocolate ganache, with delicate white icing patterns and two small pink rosettes decorating the top edge. The slice is triangular, with a thick, even layer of chocolate covering all sides and a smooth, slightly shiny finish. The cake's interior appears moist and dense, with the pink filling providing a striking contrast to the dark chocolate. A metal fork is placed beside the plate, suggesting the cake is ready to be eaten. The overall presentation is elegant and appetizing, suitable for a café or urban bakery setting.
description: A glossy, dark chocolate cake slice with pink filling and white icing decorations, served on a round plate with a fork. The cake features two layers of filling and a smooth, elegant finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing two pink filling layers between thick chocolate cake, with white icing on top.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the triangular shape, decorative icing, and pink rosettes on the top edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible layers and a clear look at the plate and fork arrangement.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the decorated top edge with pink rosettes and white icing dots.
